name: Jodi Ami Beche Firi
overview: Robiul Alam, a corrupted engineer struggles to maintain a relationship with his wife and girlfriend, so he decides to buy her a ready flat as a gift. His problem arises when he becomes trapped in his newly purchased apartment's lift.
